judge_reason: Description A describes an arrow and typed label while Description B describes a sketch with typed labels 'Facing South' and 'EAST', indicating they are describing different visual content entirely.
original_image_tags: A sparse, hand-drawn diagram on a cream-colored, aged paper page. The paper has two punched holes at the top edge. At the top left, an arrow points right with the typed label "
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned document page with two punched holes at the top and simple orientation markings, including the typed text “Facing South” and three compass labels: “NORTH” near a vertical line at upper right, “WEST” at lower right, and “SOUTH EAST” shown twice near the center.*
